prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 23592→22193→23113→27996，2025 年较 2024 年大幅后移约 4883 名，为近四年最大降幅，显示报考热度明显降温；2025 年基准约 27996 名；2025 年物理类计划 205 人，2026 年计划 222 人，扩招约 8.3%，招生名额增加使竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名持续上升，2021 年第 113 名→2026 年第 97 名，首次进入百强，学校综合实力和认可度稳步提升；2022 年曾因学校管理问题出现偏负面舆情，但近年无新增负面事件；抖音热度排名第 63（一般），短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；无投档断档记录；化学工程与技术为 A- 学科，是该校唯一 A- 及以上学科；与招生专业中的化学工程与工艺、制药工程等直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高 热推荐，与该校物理类主力招生专业高度重合，热门专业吸引力较强；四川省 2026 年普通高考考生约 53.5 万人，较 2025 年（约 46.3 万）大幅增加约 15.5%，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的降温惯性、2026 年扩招约 8.3% 的缓解效应、软科排名首次进入百强的利好、以及四川省考生总数大幅增加带来的竞争加剧，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约 29589 名，区间 29089–30089 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 science/physics category minimum ranking approximately 23592→22193→23113→27996, 2025 significantly dropped by about 4883 places compared to 2024, the largest decline in four years, indicating a clear cooling of application enthusiasm; 2025 baseline approximately 27996; 2025 physics category plan 205 students, 2026 plan 222 students, expansion of about 8.3%, increased enrollment slots slightly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking continuously rising, 2021 113th→2026 97th, first time entering top 100, school comprehensive strength and recognition steadily improving; 2022 had negative public opinion due to school management issues, but no new negative events in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking 63 (average), short video exposure medium, no obvious signal of increased application attention; no record of missing admission thresholds; Chemical Engineering and Technology is A- discipline, the only A- or above discipline at the school; directly corresponds to enrollment majors such as Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmaceutical Engineering, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronics/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended, highly overlapping with the school's main physics category enrollment majors, strong appeal of popular majors; Sichuan Province 2026 general college entrance exam candidates approximately 535,000, significantly increased by about 15.5% compared to 2025 (approximately 463,000), intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the cooling inertia of the significant ranking decline in 2025, the easing effect of about 8.3% expansion in 2026, the positive impact of Soft Science ranking first entering top 100, and the intensified competition due to the large increase in Sichuan candidate numbers, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to decline from 2025; predicted minimum ranking approximately 29589, range 29089–30089.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 29089–30089, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors can be attempted (historical rankings approximately 14000–19000, requiring rankings significantly better than the predicted range), and Tier 3 majors as safety options. The school's Chemical Engineering and Technology (A-) is the strongest discipline, although it belongs to the biology, chemistry, environment, and materials category, its disciplinary strength is outstanding and worth attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 5190→5799→5934→5545, with a year-by-year decline from 2022 to 2024, and a rebound forward by about 389 places in 2025; the 2025 baseline is approximately 5545; the 2025 history category plan is 20 students, and the 2026 plan is 18 students, a 10% reduction in enrollment, which intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has been continuously rising, entering the top 100 for the first time in 2026 (ranked 97th), with improved overall strength; in 2022, there was some negative public opinion due to school management issues, but no new negative incidents in recent years; Douyin popularity is average; no record of admission gaps; Chemical Engineering and Technology A- is the only A- or above discipline, which is not directly related to liberal arts enrollment majors; liberal arts majors lack A-class discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of liberal arts majors such as law and accounting is divided and wait-and-see; Chinese Language and Literature is recommended; the number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Sichuan Province in 2026 is about 535,000, a significant increase compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend of the 2025 ranking moving forward, the intensified competition effect of a 10% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Sichuan Province, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5232, with a range of 4732–5732.

This university's liberal arts majors lack A-class discipline support, so it is advisable to prioritize Accounting (advantageous for civil service exams) and Law when applying.
